details: The Khilaadee Protsaahan Yojana, a scheme of the Madhya Pradesh Building Department under the Labor Department, provides financial assistance to registered construction workers or their family members under the MP Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have excelled in sports.
benefits: On selection at various levels, incentive amount is payable as follows:-
(Category – A) Incentive amount on getting selected in district/divisional/state level sports.
(Category – B) Incentive amount given by the Board for being winner in District/Divisional/State level game.
eligibility: The applicant should be a native of Madhya Pradesh.
Family members registered under MP Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The applicant should be a bank account.

offline: Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format, along with a certificate issued by the District Superintendent of Police or the District Sports Officer through a recognized sports organization, to the designated officer as follows:
For urban areas: Commissioner/Chief Municipal Officer, Urban Local Body
The incentive amount for the winner of the sports competition organized by the division under Category-B will be provided by the organizing Labor Department officer.
Chief Executive Offcer, Janpad Panchayat and Commissioner/Chief Municipal Officer, Urban Local Body

documents_required: Application form in the prescribed format along with a copy of the registration card,
Certificate given by the District Superintendent of Police and District Sports Officer through the sports organization.
Construction workers and their family members holding valid identity cards.
The Aadhaar Card of the applicant.

faqs.question: What is this scheme ?
faqs.answer: To provide incentives to construction workers or their family members registered under MP Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board for their excellent performance in sports.

faqs.question: Is this scheme only for rural areas ?
faqs.answer: No, this is applicable to urban and rural both.

faqs.question: Is this scheme state sponsored scheme?
Is there any time limit for applicant?
faqs.answer: Up to 06 months after winning the qualifying sports competition.

faqs.question: Is there any offline process in Application ?
faqs.answer: It is necessary to submit the application in the prescribed format and time limit at the office of the designated officer.

faqs.question: Who will get the benefits this scheme?
faqs.answer: Construction workers and their family members

faqs.question: What is the financial eligibility criteria ?
faqs.answer: There will be no restriction on income for the beneficiary to get assistance under the scheme.
